title: Blender frame metadata JSONL record
description: One JSON object per line in frame_metadata.jsonl. Emitted by src/blender_sim/simulation.py for GT labels and optional 2D bbox evaluation.

object_uid.description: Unique object name in Blender (e.g. Citrus_000).

gt_disease_class.description: Ground-truth disease label assigned at spawn (matches inference.class_names).

bbox_xyxy.description: Optional axis-aligned 2D bbox in pixel coordinates [x_min, y_min, x_max, y_max] from camera projection.

world_location.description: Optional world-space origin of object after simulation step.
